back_translation: Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy: To the church of the Thessalonians in God the Father and in Jesus Christ our Lord. May grace and peace abide with you all
We thank God always for all of you, by remembering you in our prayers without ever breaking
Because we remember before the face of God and our Father your action arising from faith, your toil arising from love, and your endurance arising from hope in our Lord Jesus Christ
Brothers and sisters who are the beloved of God, we know well that God has chosen you
Because our gospel reached you not only with words, but with mighty-effect, with the Holy Spirit, and with full-conviction, just as you know what-sort we were among you for your benefit
And you have become those who follow the example of us and of the Lord, by receiving the word in the midst of much suffering, with joy that comes from the Holy Spirit
Therefore you have become an example to all believers in the province of Macedonia and the province of Achaia
For the word of the Lord has resounded out from you, not only in the province of Macedonia and Achaia, but your faith toward God has spread out everywhere, so that we no longer need to speak anything
For those very people themselves talk about us — how you welcomed [us] when we came to you, and how you turned from idols to God to serve the living and true God
and to await His Son from heaven, whom God raised from the dead, that is, Jesus, who rescues us out from the wrath that is coming
